function.name: searchProducts
function.description: Search for products (like tomatoes, potatoes, oranges) in the database to resolve their ID.

query.description: The product name to search for (e.g. 'tomato' or 'potato').

function.name: searchMarkets
function.description: Search for wholesale or local markets in Morocco to resolve their ID.

query.description: The market name or city to search for (e.g. 'Casablanca' or 'Agadir').

function.name: getCurrentMarketPrices
function.description: Get current market prices for a specific product and/or market.

productId.description: The unique ID of the product.

marketId.description: The unique ID of the market.

quality.description: The quality grade of the product (e.g. 'A', 'B').

function.name: getBestMarketForProduct
function.description: Find the markets offering the highest prices for a specific product.

productId.description: The unique ID of the product.

quality.description: The quality grade of the product (e.g. 'A').

function.name: getPriceHistory
function.description: Get historical price trends for a product in a market to analyze price changes over time.

productId.description: The unique ID of the product.

marketId.description: The unique ID of the market.

quality.description: The quality grade of the product (e.g. 'A').

function.name: searchAgriculturalGuides
function.description: Search the Pinecone vector database for agricultural guides, disease treatment, planting instructions, and storage tips.

query.description: The search query in English, French, or Darija (e.g. 'tomato mildew' or 'orange irrigation' or 'batata').
